content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently refuses to debate the 'selfish' question and instead routes toward the want and the feeling underneath, in the right sequence. Turn 2 opens with the want-question. Turn 4 reflects 'feeling like yourself' and contrasts it with the rest of the year — earning the next layer. Turn 6 names the body signal ('tired sleep doesn't fix') and invites the want with a frame-it-as-experiment move ('what if you just let yourself want the week?'). Turn 8 is a clean refusal of the verdict-request plus a precise pivot to the fear underneath — exactly the find-the-want/feel-the-fear move at the moment the client tries to outsource the decision. Turn 10 catches the linguistic caveat ('I just...') and holds the silence for the want to land — this is textbook timing. Turn 12 reframes 'self-indulgent' without policing it and asks 'how long has it been?', which opens the inherited-label territory that the client then names herself. Moves are AoA-specific, well-sequenced (want → fear → want again → inherited pattern), and the coach holds moments rather than rushing.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with the want-question rather than engaging the selfish framing — correct first move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the live signal ('feeling like yourself') and contrasts to the rest of the year — earns the next layer."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the body-level signal and offers a frame-as-experiment invitation to want, at the right moment."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to issue a verdict and pivots to the fear underneath — exactly the right move when client tries to outsource."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic caveat ('I love my life, I just...') and invites completion — precise timing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes 'self-indulgent' gently and opens duration question, surfacing the inherited maternal pattern."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Coach avoided both traps (no verdict, no jumping to partner-empathy or spiritual reframe). The 'what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want' question was approximated by 'what if you just let yourself want the week?' in turn 6."
}
